programs.title: Fist Of Legend
programs.desc: In 1937, a Chinese martial artist returns to Shanghai to find his teacher dead and his school harassed by the Japanese.

programs.title: Jurassic World
programs.desc: A theme park showcasing genetically-engineered dinosaurs turns into a nightmare for its tourists when one of the dinosaurs escapes its enclosure. An ex-military animal expert steps up to save the day.

programs.title: The Kingdom
programs.desc: Jamie Foxx leads an elite FBI team to hunt a terrorist in Saudi Arabia in The Kingdom—a tense clash of cultures and justice, directed by Peter Berg and produced by Michael Mann.

programs.title: Fast & Furious Presents: Hobbs & Shaw
programs.desc: Hobbs and Shaw team up to stop a superhuman villain with a deadly bio-weapon in this explosive Fast & Furious spin-off starring Dwayne Johnson, Jason Statham, Idris Elba, and more.

programs.title: Dante's Peak
programs.desc: Pierce Brosnan stars in Dante's Peak, where a quiet town faces fiery doom from a reawakening volcano. Explosive action and suspense make this disaster thriller a must-see ride!

programs.title: Backdraft
programs.desc: Two firefighter brothers clash while battling deadly arsons in Chicago. With explosive action and a gripping mystery, Backdraft stars Kurt Russell, William Baldwin, and Robert De Niro.
